data.description:
## Task

Update all absorbed script name references in plugins/dso/skills/ files.

## Mapping

- `sprint-next-batch.sh` → `ticket next-batch` (in prose: `ticket next-batch`; in shim calls: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket next-batch`)
- `sprint-list-epics.sh` → `ticket list-epics` (in prose: `ticket list-epics`; in shim calls: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list-epics`)

When a reference appears inside a bash code block as `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id>`, replace with `.claude/scripts/dso ticket next-batch <epic-id>`.

When a reference appears as `sprint-next-batch.sh --json` (no shim prefix), replace with `ticket next-batch --json`.

## Files to Modify

### plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (17 references)
Lines: 87, 103, 952, 953, 996, 998, 999, 1005, 1028, 1036, 1065, 1118, 1194, 1253, 1259, 1346 (and nearby context if additional refs)

Replace:
- `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all --has-tag=brainstorm:complete` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list-epics --all --has-tag=brainstorm:complete`
- `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list-epics --all`
- `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id>` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket next-batch <epic-id>`
- `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id> --limit=N` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket next-batch <epic-id> --limit=N`
- All other `sprint-next-batch.sh` prose references → `ticket next-batch`
- All other `sprint-list-epics.sh` prose references → `ticket list-epics`

### plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (1 reference — line 56)
`.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --brainstorm` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list-epics --brainstorm`

### plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (1 reference — line 1055)
Prose reference: `sprint-list-epics.sh` → `ticket list-epics`

### plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (1 reference — line 798)
Prose: `sprint-next-batch.sh --json output format` → `ticket next-batch --json output format`

### plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/batch-conflict-matrix.md (2 references — lines 11, 17)
Both have `# shim-exempt: internal orchestration script` annotations. After update:
- Line 11: `$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/sprint-next-batch.sh` → `$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/ticket-next-batch.sh` (this is a direct script invocation using PLUGIN_SCRIPTS path variable, not a shim call — the shim-exempt annotation remains valid as it refers to a plugin-internal script)
- Line 17: same substitution in prose

## Done Definition
- All references to sprint-next-batch.sh and sprint-list-epics.sh in plugins/dso/skills/ are replaced with the ticket subcommand equivalents
- grep -r 'sprint-next-batch\.sh\|sprint-list-epics\.sh' plugins/dso/skills/ returns no matches (except any suppressed with # shim-exempt after the update)
- Run check-shim-refs.sh on the modified files — zero new violations

## testing_mode: GREEN
Doc-only changes. Structural check scripts (check-shim-refs.sh, check-referential-integrity.sh) serve as verification.
data.title: Sweep plugins/dso/skills/: replace sprint-next-batch.sh and sprint-list-epics.sh references with ticket subcommand form
